title: eschscholzia parvula
intro: Eschscholzia parvula, also known as the dwarf California poppy or small poppy, is a small annual plant that belongs to the poppy family and is native to California in the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. It is said to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
